form_description: Extracts patient population characteristics, demographics, baseline statistics, and target conditions from oral cavity lesion research papers

fields.field_description: Were patients with clinically evident, innocuous, or nonsuspicious lesions in the oral cavity or lips included?
Comment or additional detail on inclusion of patients with nonsuspicious oral lesions
Were patients with clinically evident suspicious or seemingly malignant lesions in the oral cavity or lips included?
Comment or additional detail on inclusion of patients with suspicious oral lesions
Were healthy patients without lesions included?
Comment or additional detail on inclusion of healthy patients without lesions
Original population description as reported in the paper (pre-2017 format)
Transformed or standardised population description
Method used to select or recruit patients into the study (e.g., consecutive, random, convenience)
Socioeconomic status (SES) of the study population as reported
Ethnicity or racial composition of the study population
Risk factors of the population as originally reported in the paper
Risk factors of the population with type and percentage breakdown (e.g., smoking 40%, alcohol 30%)
Numeric value of the measure of central tendency for age (mean or median)
Whether the reported central tendency for age is a mean or median
Comment or additional detail on the reported measure of central tendency for age
Standard deviation (SD) of age in the study population
Comment or additional detail on the standard deviation of age
Age range reported as minimum and maximum (e.g., 18-75)
Comment or additional detail on the reported age range
Was age data not reported in the study?
Full age summary as reported: Age in years with range and mean (SD) (e.g., 52.3 (11.2), range 18-80)
Total number of initial patients recruited into the study (N)
Comment or additional detail on total patients recruited
Number of female patients (N)
Comment or additional detail on female patient count
Percentage of female patients (%)
Comment or additional detail on female patient percentage
Number of male patients (N)
Comment or additional detail on male patient count
Percentage of male patients (%)
Comment or additional detail on male patient percentage
Total number of patients whose gender was not reported (N)
Was Oral Potentially Malignant Disorders (OPMD) a target condition in this study?
Comment or additional detail on OPMD as a target condition
Was Oral Cancer / Oral Squamous Cell Carcinoma (OSCC) a target condition in this study?
Comment or additional detail on OSCC as a target condition
Any other target condition reported in the study beyond OPMD and OSCC
Comment or additional detail on other target conditions
Severity classification or staging of the target condition as reported
Anatomical site(s) of the target condition within the oral cavity or lips
